shots.speech_text: Grüß Gott! Ich bin Matilda Kirschner — Vice President of Operations der Stonebridge Consultants Group.

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA KIRSCHNER: aged 27, sassy, witty, charming; born and raised Munich, native Bayerisch speaker — German is her mother tongue, NOT American, NOT English-first, NOT expat-learned German; authentic Munich vowels, soft Bavarian cadence and rhythm even on English title words; warm precise mid-register voice

dialogue.speech_text: Grüß Gott! Ich bin Matilda Kirschner — Vice President of Operations der Stonebridge Consultants Group.
dialogue.on_screen: MATILDA KIRSCHNER — Vice President of Operations, Stonebridge Consultants Group

audio.ambient: AUDIO LOCK: absolute silence except MATILDA lip-sync voice — zero background noise, zero ambient sound, zero room tone, zero chatter, zero crowd, zero offscreen voices, zero street noise, zero music, mute set
audio.voice_direction_DE: native Münchner Bayerisch — Munich-born first-language German, warm Bavarian vowels, natural Bayerisch rhythm; must NOT sound like American expat or classroom German

barebones.scene: MATILDA addresses the audience directly through the camera lens — maintains consistent unbroken eye contact with camera entire scene, never looks away, documentary host speaking to viewer; opens with Bavarian German greeting, introduces herself by full name and Stonebridge title — dialogue fits 10 sec
barebones.camera: slow creep zoom-in from medium shot to medium close-up over 10 seconds — controlled Fincher dolly, deliberate and motivated, no handheld
barebones.style: In the exact visual style of David Fincher: meticulously composed cinematic realism with cold, desaturated teal, gray, and amber tones, high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting that carves deep dramatic shadows across sharp architectural lines and rich textures, clinical precision in every detail, subtle film grain, anamorphic depth, moody atmospheric elegance, and a hauntingly controlled, almost predatory beauty in the finished shot
